desc: Centres adjacent mover elements around a kept reference element by translating them along the kept element's direction axis.
summary: Centres adjacent mover elements around a kept reference element by translating them along the kept element's direction axis.
usecase: Re-centre a group of services on a kept plant item.
notfor: Height / slope alignment (use the Match* commands). Rotation.
precondition: Active document. 1 kept + ≥1 mover resolved. Kept element has a recoverable direction.
postcondition: Each mover translated along kept axis. Kept element untouched.
logictree: 1) Resolve kept + movers. 2) Compute kept centroid + direction. 3) Project mover centroid offsets onto kept axis, compute mean. 4) Transaction: translate each mover by −mean along kept axis. 5) Commit, log. 6) Failure → WireFault + rollback.
